nodes.title: Foundations of the Nervous System
nodes.rationale: To understand how the brain works, it's essential to grasp the basic components and organization of the nervous system. This module sets the stage for all subsequent learning.
suggested_micro_topics: Basic functions of the nervous system

nodes.title: The Neuron: The Brain's Communicator
nodes.rationale: Neurons are the fundamental units of information processing in the brain. Understanding their structure and how they communicate is crucial for comprehending all brain functions.

nodes.title: Neuroanatomy: Mapping the Brain's Landscape
nodes.rationale: Knowing the physical organization of the brain helps in understanding where different functions are located and how various parts interact to produce behavior.
suggested_micro_topics: Cerebral cortex lobes and their general functions

nodes.title: Sensing the World: Perception and Sensory Systems
nodes.rationale: Our perception of the world is entirely dependent on how our brain interprets sensory input. This module explores how we see, hear, touch, taste, and smell.
suggested_micro_topics: Vision: how eyes and brain work together

nodes.title: Moving Through the World: Motor Control
nodes.rationale: Understanding how the brain initiates and coordinates movement is key to appreciating our physical interactions with the environment, from simple reflexes to complex actions.
suggested_micro_topics: Motor pathways from brain to muscle
Role of the cerebellum in coordination

nodes.title: The Thinking Brain: Cognition and Emotion
nodes.rationale: This module delves into the fascinating higher-level functions of the brain, explaining how we learn, remember, pay attention, use language, and experience emotions.

nodes.title: Brain Health and Everyday Phenomena
nodes.rationale: To connect neuroscience to daily life, this module explores how the brain maintains internal balance, its rhythms (like sleep), and how basic brain principles manifest in common experiences.
suggested_micro_topics: The neuroscience of sleep and dreams
Common neurological phenomena (e.g., optical illusions, déjà vu)
